folders.description:
# Components

This directory contains reusable React components.

## Purpose
- Shared UI components
- Layout components
- Feature-specific components
- Component utilities

# Common Components

This directory contains shared, reusable UI components.

## Purpose
- Button components
- Form elements
- Modal components
- Card components
- Navigation elements

# Layout Components

This directory contains layout-related components.

## Purpose
- Header components
- Footer components
- Sidebar components
- Grid layouts
- Container components

# Features

This directory contains feature-specific components and logic.

## Purpose
- Feature-specific components
- Feature-specific hooks
- Feature-specific services
- Feature-specific types

# Custom Hooks

This directory contains custom React hooks.

## Purpose
- Data fetching hooks
- State management hooks
- UI interaction hooks
- Form handling hooks
- Authentication hooks

# Services

This directory contains service-related functionality.

## Purpose
- API clients
- HTTP requests
- External service integrations
- Data fetching utilities

# API Services

This directory contains API endpoint-specific services.

## Purpose
- API endpoint implementations
- Service-specific logic
- API response handling
- API error handling

# HTTP Utilities

This directory contains HTTP-related utilities.

## Purpose
- Base HTTP client configuration
- Request/response interceptors
- Error handling utilities
- HTTP request helpers

# External Services

This directory contains external service integrations.

## Purpose
- Third-party service integrations
- External API clients
- Service-specific configurations
- External service utilities

# State Management

This directory contains state management related files.

## Purpose
- Redux/Context store configuration
- Action creators
- Reducers
- Selectors
- Middleware

# Utilities

This directory contains utility functions and helpers.

## Purpose
- Helper functions
- Constants
- Type definitions
- Shared utilities

# Styles

This directory contains global styles and theme configurations.

## Purpose
- Global CSS
- Theme variables
- Style utilities
- Custom styles

# Assets

This directory contains static assets used in the application.

## Purpose
- Images
- Icons
- Fonts
- Other static files

# Internationalization

This directory contains translation files and i18n configurations.

## Purpose
- Translation files
- Language configurations
- i18n utilities
- Locale data

# Configuration

This directory contains application configuration files.

## Purpose
- App configuration
- Feature flags
- Constants
- Configuration utilities

# Types

This directory contains TypeScript type definitions.

## Purpose
- Type definitions
- Interfaces
- Enums
- Type utilities

# Pages

This directory contains page components and routing logic.

## Purpose
- Page components
- Route definitions
- Page-specific logic
- Page metadata

# Context

This directory contains React Context providers and consumers.

## Purpose
- Global state contexts
- Theme contexts
- Auth contexts
- Feature-specific contexts

# Constants

This directory contains application-wide constants.

## Purpose
- API endpoints
- Configuration constants
- Enum values
- Static data
